title: Image Reviewer - AI Trainer (No experience required)
mainText:

Image Reviewer - AI Trainer (No experience required)
Posted 1 week ago∙Apply by April 9, 2026 at 11:59 PM
Save
Share
Apply externally
At a glance
$50/hr
Remote, based in United States
Work from home
Fellowship
Part-time
US work authorization required
Job description

Overview

Handshake is seeking motivated Associates, Bachelor’s, and Master’s students, as well as individuals who have already completed their degrees, to contribute to AI research initiatives in collaboration with top AI labs. As part of this program, you’ll apply your academic knowledge to help improve the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) within specific fields and topics.

Details

The position is remote and asynchronous - work independently from wherever you are.
Work remotely and independently on short-term AI training projects, with no minimum commitment to hours.
Project work includes and is not limited to developing domain-specific prompts and evaluating LLM responses.
Learn new skills while contributing to the changing world of AI across various disciplines.
Placement into a project will be dependent on project availability

What We're Looking For

Current students pursuing an Associate’s, Bachelor’s, or Master’s degree or those already holding degrees
Individuals with exceptional attention to detail and the ability to follow detailed instructions accurately
Candidates comfortable working in a primarily asynchronous, remote environment in collaboration with leading AI research labs
People who believe their knowledge and reasoning skills can challenge today’s most advanced AI systems

 

Work authorization information

F-1 students who are eligible for CPT or OPT may be eligible for projects on Handshake AI. Work with your Designated School Official to determine your eligibility.  If your school requires a CPT course, Handshake AI may not meet your school’s requirements. STEM OPT is not supported. See our Help Center article for more information on what types of work authorizations are supported on Handshake AI.

What’s it like working as a Handshake AI trainer?
Project availability

Projects are completed independently and their availability is subject to change with short notice.

Community standards

Fraud and community guidelines are taken seriously to protect our community.

Project requirements

Each project is unique with their own expectations, assessments, and requirements.

Learn more about about the experience by visiting our help center.

About the employer
Handshake AI

Internet & Software

Follow
250-1,000 employees

San Francisco, CA

Handshake AI is the expert network for the AI economy. Through its fellowship program, it sources, trains, and manages experts—from recent grads to PhDs—partnering with leading AI labs to test and strengthen frontier models across every discipline. Built on Handshake’s trusted network of 18M+ students, 1500+ schools, and 1M+ employers, it mobilizes talent at scale to shape the future of AI.
